idea-plugin.name: Samurai Test Runner
idea-plugin.description:
Run Samurai BDD tests directly from the editor with gutter icons.

Features:
  • Gutter icons next to s.Test() and s.Then() calls
  • Click to run or debug specific test paths
  • Click test results to navigate to source
  • Pass/fail status indicators in the gutter
  • Works with GoLand's native test runner and debugger
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0
  • Renamed from Convey2 to Samurai
  • Rewritten for new API: s.Test(), s.Then(), s.When()
  • Gutter icons on s.Test() and s.Then() lines
  • Test result navigation to source
  • Pass/fail status icons in the gutter
